subject: Goodbye for now ?
text:
Hi there,

We noticed you haven?t been engaging, so we?ve unsubscribed you from Future Tools.

If this was a mistake or you change your mind, you?re always welcomed back. Just click below to re-subscribe:

? Resubscribe here (https://futuretools.beehiiv.com/)

Thanks again for being part of the journey. Hope to see you again soon.
